title: She Said Lil Richard Where Da Fux U @
lyrics: Thank you... You're cute. I'm so excited. Max I think we're recording now. Shit, that you fuckin' with me, fuckin' with me. You're buckin' with me, you're buckin' with me. You party with me, you party with me. You get insane, you get insane, you get insane, yeah. Shit, one more time with me and then... Two times more with me and then... Call each other friends or guests. Will we go back and be a-blessed? Will we go back and be impressed? Will we come back and be more... More than you thought that this was for. I don't wanna stop, I don't wanna stop. I don't wanna stop, I don't wanna stop. I don't wanna stop. I don't wanna stop when you're... Singing to me the way you want to do. Yeah, you're singing to me the way you always do. And I'm just... Feeling myself and bliss in this. Memories make the starts get better. Memories make me want it more. But I don't care. If you took it away, you took it away. And I'm not gonna ask you... To stay in the way. So back the fuck up, bitch. Back the fuck up. Back the fuck up, bitch. Back the fuck up. Oh yeah. Did you train your legs, bitch? Say something on the microphone. Say something. So we can pick you up. Say something loud. We're gonna call Little Richard and be like... Hey dude, what the fuck are you doing, brother? There it is. That's gonna be on there. Little Richard, what the fuck are you doing, brother? Right?
